objectives: Build mx20022-parse crate: XML parsing and serialization for ISO 20022 messages
Implement de.rs, ser.rs, envelope.rs, error.rs modules
Write roundtrip integration tests for BusinessApplicationHeaderV04
Fix any compilation/test/lint issues before finishing
constraints: cargo check/test/clippy/fmt must all pass on full workspace
Do not hand-edit generated/ files - use codegen to regenerate
important_facts: quick-xml cannot serialize/deserialize enum newtype variants in normal struct fields - requires $value wrapper
xs:choice types (EnumDef) need ChoiceWrapper<T> wrapper in struct fields for quick-xml compatibility
ChoiceWrapper<T> added to mx20022-model/src/common/choice.rs with Deref/DerefMut/From impls
Codegen struct emitter now takes HashSet<String> of choice type names and emits ChoiceWrapper<T> for those fields
Codegen enum emitter now emits #[allow(clippy::large_enum_variant)] on all choice enums
All 3 model files (head_001_001_04, pacs_008_001_13, pacs_002_001_14) regenerated with updated codegen
Codegen insta snapshot updated to reflect ChoiceWrapper usage
hdr.fr is now ChoiceWrapper<Party51Choice> - access inner via .inner or Deref (*hdr.fr)
decisions_made: Use ChoiceWrapper<T> wrapper struct with $value field instead of boxing enum variants: preserves serde compatibility and quick-xml round-trip without changing enum types
Implement Deref/DerefMut on ChoiceWrapper<T> for ergonomic access to inner enum: reduces boilerplate at call sites
Add #[allow(clippy::large_enum_variant)] to all xs:choice enums: boxing would break quick-xml serde mapping for newtype variants
Parse namespace detection uses string scanning rather than full XML parse: simpler, no extra deps, sufficient for the use case
artifacts: crates/mx20022-codegen/src/emit/mod.rs (updated: choice set, passes to emit_struct)
risks_issues: quick-xml $value semantics: resolved - ChoiceWrapper handles this correctly
Large enum variants: resolved - #[allow(clippy::large_enum_variant)] on all EnumDef types

iteration.summary: Built the complete mx20022-parse crate with four modules: error.rs (ParseError), de.rs (from_str/from_reader wrappers), ser.rs (to_string/to_string_with_declaration), envelope.rs (detect_message_type parsing ISO 20022 namespace URIs). Discovered that quick-xml cannot serialize/deserialize enum newtype variants in normal struct fields without a $value wrapper. Fixed this by introducing ChoiceWrapper<T> in mx20022-model/src/common/ and updating the codegen struct emitter to automatically detect and wrap xs:choice fields. Regenerated all three model files and updated the codegen snapshot. All 7 roundtrip integration tests pass including the full BusinessApplicationHeaderV04 serialize+deserialize identity test. Full workspace: check, clippy -D warnings, fmt --check, test all pass.
outputs_produced: Updated codegen emitters + regenerated model types
next_actions: Build mx20022-validate crate (item 4 still in_progress per DB)
Update codegen snapshot for new enums.rs output (may need update if more schemas added)
